SEARCH
Package org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation

Class IsabelleHandlerServices

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation.IsabelleHandlerServices
public class IsabelleHandlerServices extends Object
Adapted version of the SMTHandlerServices for the Isabelle translation.

This class provides some infrastructure to the translation process.

In particular, it collects the preamble and the snippets for the handlers such that they need not be read from disk multiple times.

This class is a singleton.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static IsabelleHandlerServices getInstance()
      Get the instance of this singleton.
      Returns:
      non-null instance of this class. Always the same.

    • getTemplateHandlers

      public Collection<IsabelleHandler> getTemplateHandlers(String[] handlerNames) throws IOException
      Load the original/template IsabelleHandler instances (from the snippetMap) of all handlers specified as arguments. Add fresh handlers to the snippetMap and load the snippets that belong to these instances if that has not happened yet for any object of a given handler class.

      Caution: Do not call this method too often since it may add to the static map of instances to snippets.

      It would be a good idea to call this method (at most) once for each solver type with a custom array of handler names.

      An empty handlerNames list leads to the usage of the handlers defined by defaultHandlers.txt.

      Parameters:
      handlerNames - a non-null list of non-null strings with class names (s. above)
      Returns:
      a fresh collection containing only the original IsabelleHandlers from the snippetMap's key set that match the given handler names. The collection's order matches that of the names as well.
      Throws:
      IOException - if loading the snippet Properties for a handler class fails

    • getFreshHandlers

      public List<IsabelleHandler> getFreshHandlers(Services services, @NonNull String[] handlerNames, String[] handlerOptions, IsabelleMasterHandler mh) throws IOException
      Get a copy of freshly created IsabelleHandlers by cloning the reference handlers. They can be used to translate problems to Isabelle.
      Parameters:
      services - passed on to the handlers for initialisation
      handlerNames - the fully classified class names of the IsabelleHandlers to be used If this is empty or null, all existing handlers will be used.
      handlerOptions - arbitrary String options for the IsabelleHandlers
      mh - passed on to the handlers for initialisation
      Returns:
      a freshly created list of freshly created handlers
      Throws:
      IOException - if the resources cannot be read
